mapper.select: select t.statistics_time as alarmtime, t.exception_message as alarmcontent, t.name as tableNameCh, t.table_name_en as tableNameEn, t.sjxjbm as tableId, t.alarm_level as levelName from table_organization_assets t where t.statistics_time >= to_char(sysdate - 1) and t.statistics_time < to_char(sysdate) and t.table_state = '异常'
